chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1472 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 18.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Arshad Tariq, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant files withdrawal application and does not press the instant criminal bail application, which is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
